candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A line appears at the same level as Direct costs, Personnel expenses, and Other operating expenses, not clearly as a COGS-specific subcomponent. With only Direct costs selected for the COGS bucket, this row does not clearly belong specifically to COGS, so adding it to COGS risks misallocation and double counting.

variables.notes: No explicit COGS-specific depreciation/amortisation row is shown. The generic standalone D&A line is better treated outside COGS.

candidates.why: Standalone operating D&A line is presented separately from the selected XSGA_COMPONENTS rows ('Personnel expenses' and 'Other operating expenses'). Since earlier mapping explicitly excluded D&A from XSGA_COMPONENTS to avoid double counting, this same-level separate row should be added later rather than assumed embedded in the selected XSGA rows.

variables.notes: Use the standalone summary D&A row once for SG&A-related operating overhead; do not also add it to COGS.
